title: tengine.silo.verify v1
description: Fires when verification_report.json appears in a silo session dir — the run completed cleanly. Subset of the full report (which can be 100KB+); session_dir holds the full artifact set for deep-dives.

success.description: verification.success from the report — overall pass/fail.

message.description: verification.message — one-line human summary (e.g. '6 PASS, 3 FAIL, 1 WARN (Avg: 12.0 FPS)').

top_anomaly_codes.description: First N anomaly codes from analysis.anomalies (truncated; full list in session_dir).
